text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O comes to me asking for<n>a "meager
favor" a few days before<n>the holidays.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would you arrange a small<n>holiday party
for me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I would need you to gather royalty<n>from around
the world, of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What? Are you burdened with other
responsibilities? Then I shall lower<n>my standards
slightly...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How about gathering the most<n>influential people
you can? So long as<n>you put in the effort, I'll be
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's never really a choice with her, so<n>I accept. I
just hope she doesn't<n>wind up stepping on too
many toes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Then, on the big day...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I see. That venue has your<n>company's
sponsorship. Just<n>wonderful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Gifting a cape customized for me?!<n>This is an
honor!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O manages to turn her usual<n>behavior down
a notch in front of the<n>guests.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: After our lively party comes to a<n>close...

You have my thanks, Trainer. That<n>was time very
well spent.

As a result, I was able to make the<n>guests familiar
with what kind of<n>Umamusume I, T.M. Opera O,
truly am.
Hm? A plot, you say?
choice_data_list: You weren't acting like your usual self.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ohh, because I was somewhat quiet?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was indeed holding back. After<n>all, had I
unleashed my full voice...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My sheer nobleness would have left<n>them
petrified. I do not wish to create<n>such casualties.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I need humanity to adjust little by little<n>to the
soon-to-be-born brilliance of the<n>Centurial
Overlord.
But of course!

Opera O raises her hands to the night<n>sky and
begins weaving her epic tale.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At this moment, the species known<n>as humankind,
in its eternal leading<n>role, dances atop the stage
we call<n>Earth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They believe their position to be<n>infallible.
However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The overwhelmingly powerful and<n>beautiful
Centurial Overlord is on the<n>cusp of birth. The
peerless<n>Umamusume that is I.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What would befall those influential<n>individuals if
they were to behold me<n>without prior preparation?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Surely, ninety-nine percent of them<n>would become
devout worshippers.<n>But the remaining one
percent would<n>be so overwhelmed, they would
be...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely so. I must prove that I mean<n>them no
harm beforehand, lest their<n>awe turn to terror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not misunderstand. My quiet<n>demeanor was
meant to have appeal.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have confidence the appropriate<n>amount of my
excellence came<n>across to each guest at today's
party.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that one hundred percent of<n>them will become
my believers,<n>senseless conflict can be avoided.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is a great deal of weightoff my shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It turns out the holiday party I thought<n>was just a
lark had a lot more<n>meaning to Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I pray that today's guests will<n>become my
walle—my biggest fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I pray that they will see me as a<n>top athlete
and sponsor my efforts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Also! I pray that they will build theme<n>parks
dedicated to me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Operaland! T.M. Opera Gardens!<n>And Opera O
Studios Japan, as well!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: ...So much for being levelheaded.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. You know what<n>you must do,
yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must bring me more persons of<n>influence.
Their connections will be<n>indispensable in getting
my<n>worldwide amusement park plan off<n>the
ground.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And bring actual royalty to next<n>year's party!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No complaints or excuses. It is your<n>duty to walk
this shining path at my<n>side.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Quite the demanding festive gift...<n>Opera O laughs
as she assigns me<n>this nearly impossible task.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you know not, then follow me. A<n>short initiation
is in order.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, Opera O brings me to...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, Trainer. I took the<n>roundabout route
today so you could<n>ease into understanding me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But there is a more direct way—a bold<n>and
overlordly way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! That is... to bring out the<n>most influential
version of yourself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: In other words, you must becomethe ruler of humanity!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You already possess the necessary<n>ability. Just
look at my sheer number<n>of fans!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Due to your efforts, I have acquired<n>many devoted
followers!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If a ruler of humanity with your skills<n>were to unite
with the Centurial<n>Overlord of Umamusume, the
world<n>would finally know peace, would it<n>not?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You know every bit of my person, my<n>brilliance. If
you were to become<n>humanity's
representative—why,<n>there shouldn't even be
need for<n>discussion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: After all... Even the Overlord needs a<n>partner.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Opera O smiles at me gently.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, this is the physical<n>embodiment of my
promise. Would<n>you accept this ring?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The promise ring I have kept warm<n>and near my
heart for so long.
choice_data_list: Exactly what kind of ring is that?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It could be referred to, I<n>suppose, as the
proof of engagement<n>between two species.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is the Ring of the Nibelung!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With its magical power, you can seize<n>the will of
humankind—and take over<n>the world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha! Now, laugh with me!<n>Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I laugh, though I don't really know<n>what she's on
about. Either way, I'll<n>remember this holiday
season as the<n>one when Opera O introduced me to
a<n>brand new world.
